research.title: Develop with AI: Balancing speed and confidence without becoming a bottleneck
research.summary: A few months ago, my team finished an experiment: build a complex production application entirely with AI coding assistance. The app shipped. It works. But the lessons from getting there changed how I think about software development more than any tool I've.

research.title: SonarQube CLI brings multilayered verification to agentic development
research.summary: AI coding agents are generating an increasing share of production code. The ideal agent loop generates, checks, and fixes at machine speed, producing and modifying code across entire codebases faster than any manual workflow, but that is not the case. Volume.

research.title: CVE-2026-20253 | Splunk Enterprise PostgreSQL Sidecar Service Arbitrary File Write Vulnerability
research.summary: Splunk has disclosed CVE-2026-20253, a critical unauthenticated arbitrary file write vulnerability affecting Splunk Enterprise. The flaw exists in a PostgreSQL sidecar service endpoint that lacks authentication controls, allowing a network-reachable attacker.

vulns.title: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager Improper Encoding or Escaping of Output Vulnerability
vulns.summary: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager formerly SD-WAN vManage contains an improper encoding or escaping of output vulnerability. This vulnerability could allow an authenticated, local attacker to execute arbitrary commands as root by.
vulns.technicalSummary: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager formerly SD-WAN vManage contains an improper encoding or escaping of output vulnerability. This vulnerability could allow an authenticated, local attacker to execute arbitrary commands as root by.

vulns.title: Lab khai thác lỗ hổng IDOR trên Saleor GraphQL - query order() không kiểm tra xác thực, lộ toàn bộ PII.
vulns.summary: | Lab khai thác lỗ hổng IDOR trên Saleor GraphQL - query order() không kiểm tra xác thực, lộ toàn bộ PII (email, địa chỉ, SĐT) của khách hàng. Bao gồm môi trường Docker, script seed data và PoC. CVSS 4.0: 8.7 HIGH.

vulns.title: GL.iNet Beryl AX Triple RCE PoC
vulns.summary: A flaw has been found in GL.iNet GL-MT3000 4.4.5. This impacts the function snprintf of the file /cgi-bin/glc of the component FTP Protocol Handler. Executing a manipulation of the argument media_dir can lead to command.
vulns.technicalSummary: A flaw has been found in GL.iNet GL-MT3000 4.4.5. This impacts the function snprintf of the file /cgi-bin/glc of the component FTP Protocol Handler. Executing a manipulation of the argument media_dir can lead to command.

vulns.title: GL.iNet Beryl AX Triple RCE PoC
vulns.summary: A vulnerability has been found in GL.iNet GL-MT3000 up to 4.4.5. Affected is the function FUN_0042e200 of the file /cgi-bin/glc of the component SET_USER_PWD Handler. The manipulation of the argument Password leads to command.

vulns.title: GL.iNet Beryl AX Triple RCE PoC
vulns.summary: A vulnerability was detected in GL.iNet GL-MT3000 4.4.5. This affects the function dlopen in the library /usr/lib/oui-httpd/rpc/ of the component Path Normalization Handler. Performing a manipulation of the argument dev_name.
vulns.technicalSummary: A vulnerability was detected in GL.iNet GL-MT3000 4.4.5. This affects the function dlopen in the library /usr/lib/oui-httpd/rpc/ of the component Path Normalization Handler. Performing a manipulation of the argument dev_name.
vulns.breakdown: A vulnerability was detected in GL.iNet GL-MT3000 4.4.5. This affects the function dlopen in the library /usr/lib/oui-httpd/rpc/ of the component Path Normalization Handler. Performing a manipulation of the argument dev_name.
